positive: A stylized, minimalist cosmic fox spirit (kitsune) silhouette, depicted with flowing, ethereal tails and elegant posture, standing amidst abstract celestial nebula elements. The design uses highly contrasted tones of deep indigo, vibrant sapphire, cosmic magenta, and shimmering gold foil effects. The style is graphic novel meets celestial geometry, emphasizing clean lines and strong, distinct shapes for apparel printing. Composition must be central, highly symmetrical, and contained within a circular or square frame for optimal print placement. The overall mood is mystical, magical, and serene. High contrast, vector quality, perfect for screen printing.
